title.en: China-to-Maldives Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入马尔代夫：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入馬爾地夫：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Maldives Ministry of Economic Development, Maldives Energy Authority, STELCO and FENAKA project expectations, IEC-aligned PV inverter safety, anti-islanding, grid, EMC and harsh island-environment requirements — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与马尔代夫经济发展部、马尔代夫能源署、STELCO和FENAKA项目预期、IEC导向的光伏逆变器安全、防孤岛、并网、EMC及严酷岛屿环境要求——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與馬爾地夫經濟發展部、馬爾地夫能源署、STELCO和FENAKA項目預期、IEC導向的光伏逆變器安全、防孤島、併網、EMC及嚴酷島嶼環境要求——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Maldives Energy Authority approval, STELCO or FENAKA interconnection approval, customs determination, tender qualification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Maldives Energy Authority, Ministry of Economic Development, STELCO, FENAKA, project-owner, and tender requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、马尔代夫能源署批准、STELCO或FENAKA并网批准、海关裁定、投标资格或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马尔代夫能源署、经济发展部、STELCO、FENAKA、项目业主及招标要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、馬爾地夫能源署批准、STELCO或FENAKA併網批准、海關裁定、投標資格或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬爾地夫能源署、經濟發展部、STELCO、FENAKA、項目業主及招標要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to the Maldives, the key practical gaps are: (1) project-level acceptance by STELCO in Greater Male or FENAKA in outer atolls; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (3) IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface and anti-islanding evidence; (4) IEC 61000-series or IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (5) engineering validation for a 230/400 V, 50 Hz island grid with extreme heat, humidity, salt mist, and space-constrained atoll installations. Maldives uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline; Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence should not be treated as automatically accepted.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口马尔代夫时，主要实际差距包括：（1）在大马累地区取得STELCO项目级接受，或在外环礁取得FENAKA项目级接受；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口及防孤岛证据；（4）IEC 61000系列或IEC 62920 EMC证据；（5）针对230/400 V、50 Hz岛屿电网以及高温、高湿、盐雾和空间受限环礁安装条件的工程验证。马尔代夫与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不应视为自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口馬爾地夫時，主要實際差距包括：（1）在大馬累地區取得STELCO項目級接受，或在外環礁取得FENAKA項目級接受；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面及防孤島證據；（4）IEC 61000系列或IEC 62920 EMC證據；（5）針對230/400 V、50 Hz島嶼電網以及高溫、高濕、鹽霧和空間受限環礁安裝條件的工程驗證。馬爾地夫與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不應視為自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
